mapper.select: select id, order_id, resources_ip, resources_id, user_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from order_renewal_resources where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select orr.id,resources_id, c.id as commodity_id, orr.order_id, orr.resources_ip from order_renewal_resources orr left join server_resources sr on orr.resources_id = sr.id left join commodity c on sr.commodity_id = c.id where orr.is_deleted = 0 and order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: insert into order_renewal_resources(id,order_id, resources_ip, resources_id, user_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{orderId}, #{resourcesIp}, #{resourcesId}, #{userId}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into order_renewal_resources(id,order_id, resources_ip, resources_id, user_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.orderId}, #{entity.resourcesIp}, #{entity.resourcesId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into order_renewal_resources(id,order_id, resources_ip, resources_id, user_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.orderId}, #{entity.resourcesIp}, #{entity.resourcesId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update order_id = values(order_id), resources_ip = values(resources_ip), resources_id = values(resources_id), user_id = values(user_id), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
